care.summary: A stunning calathea with large, round, silvery-green leaves marked with fine dark green stripes.
care.light: Low to medium indirect light; avoid direct sunlight which fades patterns
care.water: Keep soil consistently moist but not soggy; use distilled or rainwater
care.soil: Well-draining peat-based mix with perlite for moisture retention
care.humidity: High (60%+); thrives with a humidifier, pebble tray, or terrarium environment
care.fertilizer: Dilute balanced fertilizer every 4 weeks spring through summer
common_issues: Brown leaf edges from low humidity or tap water chemicals
Curling leaves from underwatering or dry air
Faded leaf patterns from too much direct light
tips: Use filtered, distilled, or rainwater — calatheas are sensitive to fluoride
Mist regularly or use a humidifier to prevent crispy leaf edges
Wipe leaves with a damp cloth to keep pores clean
Does best in warm, draft-free spots away from windows in winter
